'''Gilliana''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Gilliana system/Legends|Gilliana system]] in the [[Cadriaan Province]]. Settlers from Gilliana colonized [[Aleron]].

[[Lanthe Artifice]] was based on Gilliana.

{{Planet-stub}}
